title: ardisia palmana
intro: Ardisia palmana is a perennial plant species, commonly known as the White Dama or White Lady of the forest, belonging to the family Primulaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, which contribute to its various health benefits. The plant is used to treat conditions such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as skin problems and wounds. Ardisia palmana is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, or used in traditional medicine to harness its potential health benefits.
